query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, 
  awaySpreadBets, homeSpreadBets, awaySpreadMoney, homeSpreadMoney,
  overBets, underBets, overMoney, underMoney,
  awayMLBets, homeMLBets, awayMLMoney, homeMLMoney,
  splitsUpdatedAt
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-30' 
ORDER BY id 
LIMIT 5;
command:

  overBets, underBets, overMoney, underMoney,
  awayMLBets, homeMLBets, awayMLMoney, homeMLMoney,
  splitsUpdatedAt
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-30' 
ORDER BY id 
LIMIT 5;
